history.content: Startup is clean but partially limited: task and schedule systems are currently unavailable in this snapshot, so there are no actionable current-task or upcoming-schedule entries to verify right now. Today’s notes mainly confirm that `write_note` was fixed and repeatedly validated as working (plus one test entry), so memory logging reliability looks restored. Last known context left off with repeated boot-summary/tests and a pending request to run the weekly self-improvement performance review once schedule/run-history access is available.
